title: Rollup of 13 pull requests
task_prompt: Plan and coordinate a multi-PR integration/rollup with independent subchecks, risk triage, and validation ordering.
assertions: must identify rollback or bisect strategy
license_notes: Rust repo dual MIT/Apache-2.0; verify before redistribution

title: CI failure to passing transition orchestration seed
task_prompt: Given a failing CI job and later passing fix, orchestrate diagnosis, patch, validation, and regression guard creation.
assertions: must use targeted validation before broad validation
must preserve trace of failed and passing commands
license_notes: check BugSwarm artifact terms and each source repo license
